title: STR Investing in NC High Country: Honest Analysis
excerpt: Short-term rental properties in the NC High Country can be genuinely lucrative — but the numbers, the regulations, and the location details matter enormously. Here's an honest, local look at what investors should know before buying in Watauga, Avery, or Ashe County.
image_alt: Mountain cabin with covered porch in the NC High Country near Boone, ideal for short-term rental investment
